channel.title: LLM Timeline — SambaNova Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from SambaNova.

item.title: EvaByte (SambaNova)
item.description: Parameters: EvaByte License: open Type: model "efficient byte-level processing at scale... [compared to tokenizer-based LMs:] 5x less training data, excelling in coding tasks, and decoding up to 2x faster. Its token-free design also brings added flexibility, avoiding tokenizer quirks while naturally extending to multimodal applications without any architecture tweaks."

item.title: Samba-1 (SambaNova)
item.description: Parameters: Samba-1 License: partial Type: model CoE: Collection of experts: Llama2 7B / 13B / 70B Mistral 7B DeepSeek Coder 1.3B / 6.7B / 33B Falcon 40B DePlot CLIP Llava
